column1: # PostgreSQL keyword inventory and reservation classes.
# @generated-source: provenance data for the keyword codegen (ADR-0004
# DO derive the Rust tables from this file via `cargo run -p squonk-sourcegen`;
# objective list every PostgreSQL release ships. Each PG_KEYWORD row tags a
# keyword with one of four reservation classes:
#   type_func_name  - usable as a function/type name
# these classes directly: a ColId rejects `type_func_name ∪ reserved`
# label rejects the AS_LABEL set (see postgres_as_label.csv).
# `end-exec` is intentionally omitted: it is not a lexable single word.
